title: BetterFF Totems
body:
#  Description
 
In this resourcepack you will find totems of all **FreeFriends**<3 players. The totems of the current player skins have been added to the resourcepack for now. There are plans to make different versions in the future. 
 

To use this pack, use [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) if you play on sodium
